description: You are a Race Officer for the Cowes Regatta. Your task is to set up a fair start line in Bridge Command by creating a new scenario directory at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/r) Cowes Regatta Start/. Configure the Solent environment with a wind direction of 235 degrees, wind speed of 15 knots, and good visibility. Position the Committee Boat at 50.7750 N, 1.3000 W, anchored and heading 235 degrees. Establish a start line perpendicular to the wind by placing a Pin End buoy exactly 0.25 nautical miles from the Committee Boat on a bearing 90 degrees to the left of the wind. Include a fleet of at least 3 sailing yachts positioned downwind (North-East) heading towards the start line. Save the calculated coordinates of the Pin End Buoy to /home/ga/Documents/sailing_instructions.txt.
